commands.review_summary:
The PR updates the shared session transcript reader to ignore `provider=openclaw` `delivery-mirror` and `gateway-injected` assistant rows when selecting latest assistant text, with focused regression tests.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main reads the newest assistant row from the transcript and Telegram uses that reader for current-turn final text, so a later `delivery-mirror` row can become the selected candidate. I did not run a live Telegram reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: No repair lane is needed; this is a focused open PR with sufficient proof and no blocking review findings, so normal maintainer validation and merge handling are the next step.
